## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and avoids unrelated edits.
- [ ] I reviewed my own diff.
- [ ] I preserved existing behavior unless the change intentionally updates it.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where practical.
- [ ] I did not commit API keys, credentials, personal data, generated secrets, or sensitive logs.
